campaign_name: Divine Printing - Church Lead Gen NYC

ads.name: Ad 1 - Free Consultation (Image)
ads.headline: Free Printing Consultation
ads.primary_text: Is your church's printing costing too much or looking unprofessional? Divine Printing specializes in church materials—bulletins, banners, flyers, and more. Get a free consultation with a church printing specialist. We serve churches throughout NYC.
ads.description: Serving NYC churches with quality printing

image_specs.content: Professional church banner or bulletin mockup with Divine Printing branding

ads.name: Ad 2 - Problem/Solution (Image)
ads.headline: Church Printing Made Easy
ads.primary_text: Tired of printing that doesn't reflect the quality of your ministry? We help NYC churches create professional bulletins, banners, and materials that make a great first impression. Free consultation—let's discuss your needs.

image_specs.content: Before/after comparison or church event with professional materials

ad_sets.name: NYC Churches - Lookalike (Future)
ad_sets.notes: Activate after collecting 100+ leads from Core Interest ad set. Create lookalike from customer list or lead form submitters.

ads.name: Ad 1 - Lookalike Creative
ads.headline: See Why Churches Choose Us
ads.primary_text: Churches throughout NYC trust Divine Printing for their bulletins, banners, and event materials. Join them and see why we're the preferred printing partner for ministries in the area. Free consultation available.

ads.name: Retargeting - Reminder
ads.headline: Still Need Printing Help?
ads.primary_text: You visited Divine Printing recently. Ready to get a quote for your church materials? We offer free consultations and fast turnaround for NYC churches. Let's talk about your next project.

image_specs.content: Friendly reminder style with church printing imagery

ads.name: Retargeting - Social Proof
ads.headline: Join NYC Churches Who Trust Us
ads.primary_text: Don't let unprofessional printing hold your church back. We've helped dozens of NYC churches create materials that match the excellence of their ministry. Get your free consultation today.

ads.name: Video - Church Printing Tips
ads.headline: 3 Printing Mistakes Churches Make
ads.primary_text: Is your church making these common printing mistakes? Watch this 60-second video to find out—and learn how to fix them. Divine Printing helps NYC churches look their best.

video_specs.content: Quick tips video showing common church printing mistakes and solutions

lead_form.name: Divine Printing - Free Consultation
fields: What do you need printed? (Bulletins, Banners, Flyers, etc.)
lead_form.thank_you_message: Thank you! We'll contact you within 24 hours to schedule your free consultation.

testing_plan.phase_1: Week 1-2: Test Ad Set 1 with 2 image variants
testing_plan.phase_2: Week 3-4: Add retargeting if website traffic sufficient
testing_plan.phase_3: Week 5+: Add lookalike when 100+ leads collected
testing_plan.evaluation: Pause any ad with CTR <1% or cost per lead >$30
